stableSelectors.cardRoot: div containing h3 title, Visit Site link, Save/Saved button, and at least one event signal
stableSelectors.title: h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6
stableSelectors.externalEventUrl: a[href] with text matching Visit Site, Apply, or Register
stableSelectors.date: time, span, div, or p text matching a month/date pattern
stableSelectors.saveControl: button text matching Save or Saved

Visit Site
detailDomReason: The rendered explore cards exposed public external Visit Site links. No stable internal Hakku detail href was present in the inspected card sample; title/card click navigation was not reliable and was not selected as the primary strategy.

networkFinding.strategy: DOM extraction first; optional bounded detail-page enrichment when internal Hakku detail URLs are present

navBehavior.cardTitleClick: not used as primary parser input
